info.name: DocuSign Click API
info.description:
DocuSign Click lets you capture consent to standard agreement terms with a single click: terms and conditions, terms of service, terms of use, privacy policies, and more. The Click API lets you include this customizable clickwrap solution in your DocuSign integrations.

Contact Support:
 Name: DocuSign Developer Center
 Email: devcenter@docusign.com

item.name: service_information
Docusign Gets the current version and other information about the Click API.
v1
accounts

download
Docusign Gets the completed user agreement PDF.

variable.description:
(Required) A GUID that identifies your account.
This value is automatically generated by
DocuSign for any account you create. Copy the
value from the **API Account ID** field in
the **API and Keys** page in
eSignature Settings.

request.description:
Gets the PDF of  `agreementId` for the clickwrap specified by `ciickwrapId`.

The response to this method is the bytes of the PDF file.
The response includes the HTTP header `application/pdf.

item.name: Docusign Gets a specific agreement for a specified clickwrap.

variable.description:
(Required) A GUID that identifies your account.
This value is automatically generated by
DocuSign for any account you create. Copy the
value from the **API Account ID** field in
the **API and Keys** page in
eSignature Settings.

request.description:
Gets the agreement specified by `agreementId`.

You can omit `agreementId` to get the latest agreement.

item.name: Docusign Checks if a user has agreed to a clickwrap.

variable.description:
(Required) A GUID that identifies your account.
This value is automatically generated by
DocuSign for any account you create. Copy the
value from the **API Account ID** field in
the **API and Keys** page in
eSignature Settings.

request.description:
Checks if a user has agreed to a clickwrap and returns a response with the agreement URL.

Returns HTTP status code OK if the user has no pending agreement.

or only the ones specified in the
`clickwrapVersionIds` query parameter.

item.name: Docusign Deletes a clickwrap and all of its versions.

query.description: A comma-separated list of versions to delete.

value from the **API Account ID** field in
the **API and Keys** page in
eSignature Settings.

request.description:
Deletes the clickwrap specified by `clickwrapId` and all of its versions.
Active clickwraps are not deleted

query.description: A comma-separated list of versions to delete.
A comma-separated list of versions to delete.

item.name: Docusign Gets all the clickwraps for an account.

query.description: Optional. The earliest date to return agreements from.
Optional. The user ID of the owner.
Optional. The page number to return.

Optional. The status of the clickwraps to filter by. One of:

- `active`
- `inactive`
Optional. The latest date to return agreements from.
